stages.representation: convergent sparse m16n8k32 signed INT8 inline PTX with selector immediates 0 and 1
stages.detail: The pinned LLVM 22 combined probe retained both selector forms and the exact wrapping s8-by-s8 instruction in C, A, B, metadata, selector API order. Its 13,238-byte IR had SHA-256 5652a669e731467a3c950b9b1aecc39e51156df2f6329a112c52569e97cd5a8b; the 39,599-byte PTX had SHA-256 4138b4c3d39aabbf987b868206ef03b4b135fb5999c31420c5c6780d11d3ab4f.

stages.representation: exact-floor PTX for base sparse m16n8k32 INT8 MMA
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted all 16 instruction and selector combinations at PTX 7.1 and sm_80; it only advised ordered metadata for future performance.
